rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE syntax and ensure valid AADL scope for all identifiers.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and maintain type consistency.
Use component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees involving component ports.
Use implementation annexes for assignments and bindings that depend on subcomponents.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions.
Equations and constants in AGREE must declare correct types (int, real, bool).
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic and logical operators for conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
